issue.title: Enhancement: 'Resume Conversation' action when the last command in a terminal was 'claude'

phases.title: Track lastCommand per terminal leaf (data layer)
verification: splitTree.ts adds `lastCommand?: string` to TerminalLeaf, preserves it in regenerateLeafIds, and exports a new `updateLeafByTerminalId` helper.
terminalStore.ts has a `setLastCommand(terminalId, command)` action that walks tabsByProject and updates the matching leaf via updateLeafByTerminalId.

Terminal.tsx onData handler maintains a local inputBuffer, calls setLastCommand only when the buffer starts with `claude` (whitelist regex `/^claude(\s|$)/`), and resets buffer on Enter / Ctrl-C / non-printable controls.
Local TypeScript verification deferred to CI.
Manual smoke: type `claude` + Enter in a terminal — `localStorage['tiki-terminals']` (DevTools) shows lastCommand = 'claude' on the matching leaf.
Manual smoke: type `pnpm install` + Enter — lastCommand is NOT set (whitelist rejects non-claude commands).
Manual smoke: type `claude --continue` then later `ls` — lastCommand remains 'claude --continue' (non-claude commands don't overwrite).

phases.title: Resume Conversation banner + autoResumeClaude setting
verification: settingsStore.ts adds autoResumeClaude to TerminalSettings and DEFAULT_TERMINAL_SETTINGS (default false).
SettingsPage.tsx has a new checkbox in Terminal section labeled 'Auto-resume Claude conversations'.
splitTree.ts has a `findLeafByTerminalId` read-only helper.
terminalStore.ts exposes a `getLeafLastCommand(terminalId)` helper that walks tabsByProject.
ResumeBanner.tsx renders lastCommand + Resume / Fresh buttons; auto-resume timer fires after 5s when autoResume prop is true.
Terminal.tsx captures `lastCommand` on mount via getLeafLastCommand and renders <ResumeBanner /> in front of the xterm container until the user picks Resume or Fresh.
Resume action: 500ms after click, writes `claude --continue\r` to the PTY via writeTerminalRef.
Fresh action: clears lastCommand (setLastCommand with empty string) and dismisses the banner.
Local TypeScript verification deferred to CI.
Manual smoke: type `claude` + Enter, force-quit the app, reopen — banner appears in that terminal showing 'Last command: claude'.
Manual smoke: click Resume — after ~500ms, `claude --continue` is typed into the shell.
Manual smoke: click Fresh — banner dismisses, terminal proceeds normally.
Manual smoke: toggle 'Auto-resume Claude conversations' in Settings, reopen a terminal with a stored claude command — banner auto-resumes after 5s.
Manual smoke: A terminal whose lastCommand was never set shows no banner.
